title: My Lord, my liege: A word on Twisha, if you may please
description: Fresh off North India’s almost theatrical fixation with “all things judiciary,” I remember being genuinely startled during my first semester of law school in the United States.A sitting senior judge, who was also teaching one of our classes, would walk into the classroom carrying his own pile of books and a heavy laptop bag, deliver a super engaging lecture and, at the end, immaculately erase the whiteboard with his own two hands, as if his job was somehow tied to diligence and earnestness rathe
